title: CRISPR RNP Electroporation Protocol
author: Aditya Mohan
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.8yfhxtn

steps.title: Subculture cells for a minimum of...
steps.instruction: Subculture cells for a minimum of 2-3 days before electroporation, and visually inspect the cells with a microscope to ensure healthy appearance.

steps.title: For each well-undergoing electroporation, dilute the...
steps.instruction: For each well-undergoing electroporation, dilute the guide RNA and Cas9 enzyme in PBS gently swirling the pipet tip while pipetting: 1.3 uL of STERILE PBS 5.1 uL of GenCrispr NLS-Cas9-EGFP Nuclease 3.6 of diluted sgRNA oligos _______________________________________________________ Total: 10 uL of total volume

steps.title: Resuspend Oligos in IDTE Buffer at...
steps.instruction: Resuspend Oligos in IDTE Buffer at 100 uM For a 2nmol IDT order, dilute oligos with 20 uL of Tris-HCL (Dharmacon)

steps.title: Incubate for 15 minutes at Room Temperature 00:15:00
steps.instruction: Incubate for 15 minutes at Room Temperature 00:15:00

steps.title: Turn on the nucleofector and load...
steps.instruction: Turn on the nucleofector and load the X-core and the program of the desired cell type (or closest cell type)

steps.title: Resuspend the Alt-R Cas9 Electroporation Enhancer...
steps.instruction: Resuspend the Alt-R Cas9 Electroporation Enhancer to 100 uM in IDTE.

steps.title: Prepare a 96 well culture plate...
steps.instruction: Prepare a 96 well culture plate to receive cells following Nucleofection (Ideally U Bottom plate and at least 175 uL of culture media) and prewarm to 37 degrees C.

steps.title: Prepare a 24 well plate with...
steps.instruction: Prepare a 24 well plate with at least 1 mL of media and prewarm to 37 degrees C

steps.title: Collect 1M cells per electroporation and...
steps.instruction: Collect 1M cells per electroporation and MAKE SURE TO WASH THE CELLS WITH PBS. Centrifuge the cells at 30g for 10 minutes at RT

steps.title: Remove as much supernatant as possible without perturbing the pellet
steps.instruction: Remove as much supernatant as possible without perturbing the pellet.

steps.title: Resuspend the cell pellet in 96...
steps.instruction: Resuspend the cell pellet in 96 uL of the Ingenio® Electroporation media Add 4 ul of the diluted electroporation enhancer Add 10 uL of the RNP gRNA mix to the well

steps.title: Load solution into the Nucleofector module...
steps.instruction: Load solution into the Nucleofector module and make sure there are no air bubbles. Zap and keep in the zap mixture for 10 seconds before removing

steps.title: Remove the cells from the cuvette...
steps.instruction: Remove the cells from the cuvette and add the cells to the quenching plate for a minimum of 4-5 hours
